headline: Visa Tests $1B Stablecoin Settlement with Brale, Canton

headline: Zcash Exploits Soar 300% Amid Counterfeiting Crisis

article.summary: Zcash developers are weighing a new shielded pool and turnstile accounting after the Orchard bug raised supply verification questions.

headline: Dollar Surges on Strong US Jobs Data

article.title: Dollar Rises as Jobs Data Boosts Fed Rate-Hike Expectations
article.summary: The dollar advanced after US jobs data came in stronger than anticipated, signaling further signs of labor market resiliency, and progress in US-Iran peace deal talks stalled.

headline: US Jobs Leap 500k, Fuels 50bp Rate Hike Odds

article.title: US Hiring Surged in May, Boosting Bets on Fed Rate Hike
article.summary:
US job growth topped all forecasts in May and the unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%, offering the clearest sign yet that the labor market may be breaking out of a prolonged period of lackluster hiring.
Frances Donald, Chief Economist at RBC, discusses the jobs data and what it signals for the US
